title: campylospermum costatum
intro: Campylospermum costatum is a plant species found in tropical Africa, belonging to the family Ochnaceae and known as the 'Yellow Stem'. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its medicinal properties in treating various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Campylospermum costatum include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for consumption, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine.
